message: Jake
Yuriko
− A few days later −
I haven’t seen Jennifer since then.
That might have been a dream.
I mean, to have something like that happen with a top actress.
I wonder what would happen if I've used up all my luck for life.
Ah.
I wonder how she’s doing right now.
Bang!
Whoa, w-what is that?!
Boss, please stop grinning like that while you’re sleeping, it’s creepy.
Eh, was I making that face?
Oh dear. Boss is gradually losing his image, isn't he? When he was first hired, he was a yuppie nice guy.
So what about now?
He feels more like a bit of a pathetic loser now, I guess.
Oh, did my excellence bring Boss to this point?
Heh.
No, I think that's not quite it.
Anyway, put in a bit more effort and please show a tighter expression, okay?
Oh, Boss, you're so close!
Huh, what?
I just received a message from Kristy.
From Kristy?
Apparently, she wants to apologize for something from before and asked you to come to her house about that.
Apologize for something from before? I wonder what that is.
It's something about meals or whatever.
Hehe, it's definitely an invitation to dinner, right?
Phew.
Hmm, I'll check it out later.
Just be careful, okay?
Boss, welcome back. Are you looking tough?
Thank you for your hard work.
is.
Look.
Talk.
Listen.
Think.
Show.
Move.
System
The　state　of　the　surroundings.
About Eva.
About Meryl.
About Kristy.
About Cindy.
About Tony.
About Jennifer.
About Eva.
About Meryl.
About Kristy.
About Cindy.
About Tony.
About Jennifer.
Luminol reagent.
To another place.
Save.
End the game.
Just me and
an office desk for me, a potted plant with shabby leaves, and just a not-too-old model of a computer.
The only thing that would be a problem if stolen is the computer, but I doubt many would want it.
Just me and
there are no customers in sight. Though honestly, I wouldn't want too many requests in a small office like ours.
It's a dark office with only a small amount of sunlight coming from the west-facing window, but I can't ask for too much. It starts out like this.
She seems put together, but there's something absent. How does a girl like this manage in New York?
With her fine, typical East Asian skin and straight, brown-tinted hair. She has an adorable face, so why don't guys approach her?
She's wearing a red suit that's almost like a uniform. Maybe I should buy her some clothes sometimes.
Boss, aren’t you getting a bit too relaxed now that Meryl’s request is likely to be wrapped up?
Well, that's because it’s pretty much done.
No way. There are still important things left.
Huh?!
Looking for Ginny and the murderer of Eva!
When did that conversation happen?
Searching for Ginny was because I regretted canceling, and solving Eva’s murder is to clear the boss's name.
The crime of killing Eva that I have no memory of, huh.
Exactly right! Let’s do our best.
Ah, it feels like the detective's blood is stirring.
I'm fired up.
I definitely think the one who killed Eva is the same as the murderer in the serial murder case.
It's too early to jump to that conclusion just because the body was dismembered.
But, ugh.
Considering that, it feels like it all adds up.
Boss, please work hard to clear your name.
I want to point out one thing. The only one who accused me of being the culprit was Andy.
Oh, was that the case? Haven't the police been keeping an eye on you?
Well, you see...
Ah.
I'm sorry.
Let's catch the culprit with our own hands!
Meryl must be having thrilling days.
Ah, it's already about tomorrow.
I wonder what kind of girl she is, that’s what they must be thinking right now.
I can't help but feel a bit envious of Meryl. They're a super glamorous mother-daughter duo, aren't they?
Kristy didn't share any details with me, but what's this apology about?
That's fine.
Oh come on, I want something! Even if I'm not directly involved.
Oh.
Hmm, I'm curious, curious, curious!
I wonder how Kristy is doing?
Well, I haven't seen her since then, so I can't really say.
I hope she's doing okay.
Even someone who seems so composed can be fragile, you know?
Tim didn't make it to the audition.
Tim, is he the boy from Cindy's boyfriend's band?
Yeah. Apparently, he auditioned thanks to Cindy's recommendation, but it seems he didn't get in.
That's really unfortunate.
But, it's a common story.
Even though the world is vast, there are only a handful of talented individuals, so it’s not that easy to go mainstream.
That's cold.
Could it be that you've experienced some setbacks in the past?
That's nonsense! I know myself well. I'm not chasing after unrealistic dreams.
I wonder why Cindy likes someone like Tim?
When you got that call from Cindy, how was she?
Well...
I thought she was just being normal. But why do you ask?
Why are you asking that?
If you can't gauge someone's condition just from their voice on the phone, you can't even be a phone operator!
That's the point of this conversation.
Come on!
Don't talk nonsense! Can Boss really pull off something so advanced?
Yeah, I'm practicing now. I feel like I'm close to getting the hang of it.
But that's great, right? Once the work is done, money will come in from Meryl.
It's not all solved yet, though.
That would be a problem! I thought I could finally pay the phone bill and taxes.
Eh?
We have automatic bank withdrawal set up.
Wait, really?
Cindy and Meryl are mother and daughter, huh?
That's kind of glamorous.
By the way, I need to check on Tony's scalpel.
Eh, what are you checking for?
The scalpel, the one I picked up.
So Boss thinks Tony is suspicious too?
Of course. He's got enough motives to rot and that scalpel could be physical evidence.
Hah.
Ah, I want to check it out already!
Do you think Jennifer is suspicious?
That's a bit sudden.
I don't really know. But a lot of people talk trash about her, so it piques my interest.
But how can we verify if what everyone is saying is true or a total lie? Why do they speak ill of her?
The director says it's envy, though.
Is it really a big risk to suddenly become famous?
Boss, did something happen with Jennifer?
Eva has become a wordless corpse.
Who could do something so cruel?
She was known for her exposé articles, so she must have plenty of enemies. It might be tough to catch the culprit.
Unfortunately, there's nothing I can do. We'll have to leave it to the police.
Though it's not as grand as before, there's still fame and income, and living with Director Fabar.
There shouldn’t be any complaints.
Then again, why did I start thinking about searching for my daughter now? It could turn into a scandal if I'm not careful.
Where does the courage come from to want to meet her, risking everything I've built until now?
I made Cindy promise to meet her mother, and the job’s almost done. For me, that's quite an achievement.
I was surprised when he suddenly pulled out a knife,
it shows that you never know what a desperate person might do.
Could he possibly stab someone else like he did to me?
No way, that can’t happen. Kristy wouldn’t do that.
Everything that happened to Kristy is Guy’s fault. He abandoned her—where did he go?
What caused the change of heart to agree to meet her mother after all this time? Did Tim persuade her?
She doesn’t seem to want to return to work, but could there have been trouble with Gloria?
Now all that's left is to introduce her to Meryl. That will be the end of my job.
He's a drug addict, frequently hangs out with call girls, and he's in debt. He has plenty of motives to kill.
Does he have some kind of kink that he can't tell anyone about? Could that have led to murder?
Why did he have a scalpel? Is it really Tonny who is the culprit?
Anyway, Tonny is way too suspicious. If I were a detective, I’d arrest him no matter what.
Why did Jennifer do something like that with someone like me?
Is there something more going on?
Or am I overthinking this? That would mean she really likes me.
I personally can’t completely deny she’s the culprit, but the rumors about Jennifer around here are hard to trust.
Jennifer’s bad reputation seems to be due to jealousy and that aloof expression she has.
See,
what do you think this is?
Let me see.
Huh, is this luminol?
Don't read the label.
Ehh, what’s going on with this? A scalpel?
Let’s check out Tonny's scalpel.
Next time.
Ugh, cheapskate.
I get it without you having to show me so many times. Are you bragging or something?
*** It's a bug ***
Ｖ＝
Ｎ＝
